add.description: Add an item to a playlist

part.description: The fields parameter specifies a comma-separated list of one or more video resource properties that the API response will include

returnAll.description: Whether to return all results or only up to a given limit

limit.description: Max number of results to return

categoryId.description: The categoryId parameter specifies a YouTube guide category, thereby requesting YouTube channels associated with that category

forUsername.description: The forUsername parameter specifies a YouTube username, thereby requesting the channel associated with that username

id.description: The ID parameter specifies a comma-separated list of the YouTube playlist ID(s) for the resource(s) that are being retrieved. In a playlist resource, the ID property specifies the playlist's YouTube playlist ID.

managedByMe.description: Whether to instruct the API to only return channels managed by the content owner that the onBehalfOfContentOwner parameter specifies

channelId.description: The channelId parameter indicates that the API response should only contain resources created by the channel

forDeveloper.description: Whether to restrict the search to only retrieve videos uploaded via the developer's application or website

publishedAfter.description: The publishedAfter parameter indicates that the API response should only contain resources created at or after the specified time

publishedBefore.description: The publishedBefore parameter indicates that the API response should only contain resources created before or at the specified time

q.description: The q parameter specifies the query term to search for

regionCode.description: The regionCode parameter instructs the API to select a video chart available in the specified region. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

relatedToVideoId.description: The relatedToVideoId parameter retrieves a list of videos that are related to the video that the parameter value identifies

videoCategoryId.description: The videoCategoryId parameter identifies the video category for which the chart should be retrieved

videoSyndicated.description: Whether to restrict a search to only videos that can be played outside youtube.com

videoType.description: The videoType parameter lets you restrict a search to a particular type of videos

h1.description: The hl parameter instructs the API to retrieve localized resource metadata for a specific application language that the YouTube website supports. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

onBehalfOfContentOwner.description: The onBehalfOfContentOwner parameter indicates that the request's authorization credentials identify a YouTube CMS user who is acting on behalf of the content owner specified in the parameter value

tags.description: Keyword tags associated with the playlist. Mulplie can be defined separated by comma.

defaultLanguage.description: The language of the text in the playlist resource's title and description properties. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

onBehalfOfContentOwnerChannel.displayName: On Behalf Of Content Owner Channel
onBehalfOfContentOwnerChannel.description: The onBehalfOfContentOwnerChannel parameter specifies the YouTube channel ID of the channel to which a video is being added. This parameter is required when a request specifies a value for the onBehalfOfContentOwner parameter, and it can only be used in conjunction with that parameter.

endAt.description: The time, measured in seconds from the start of the video, when the video should stop playing

note.description: A user-generated note for this item. The property value has a maximum length of 280 characters.

position.description: The order in which the item appears in the playlist. The value uses a zero-based index, so the first item has a position of 0, the second item has a position of 1, and so forth.

startAt.description: The time, measured in seconds from the start of the video, when the video should start playing

embeddable.description: Whether the video can be embedded on another website

notifySubscribers.description: Whether YouTube should send a notification about the new video to users who subscribe to the video's channel

publicStatsViewable.description: Whether the extended video statistics on the video's watch page are publicly viewable

publishAt.description: If you set a value for this property, you must also set the status.privacyStatus property to private

recordingDate.description: The date and time when the video was recorded

selfDeclaredMadeForKids.description: Whether the video is designated as child-directed, and it contains the current "made for kids" status of the video

moderate.description: YouTube will filter some content from search results and, at the least, will filter content that is restricted in your locale

none.description: YouTube will not filter the search result set

strict.description: YouTube will try to exclude all restricted content from the search result set

brandingSettingsUi.description: Encapsulates information about the branding of the channel

country.description: The country with which the channel is associated. Update this property to set the value of the snippet.country property.

description.description: The channel description, which appears in the channel information box on your channel page. The property's value has a maximum length of 1000 characters.

defaultLanguage.description: The content tab that users should display by default when viewers arrive at your channel page

featuredChannelsTitle.description: The title that displays above the featured channels module. The title has a maximum length of 30 characters.

featuredChannelsUrls.description: A list of up to 100 channels that you would like to link to from the featured channels module. The property value is a list of YouTube channel ID values, each of which uniquely identifies a channel.

keywords.description: Keywords associated with your channel. The value is a space-separated list of strings.

moderateComments.description: Whether user-submitted comments left on the channel page need to be approved by the channel owner to be publicly visible

profileColor.description: A prominent color that complements the channel's content

showRelatedChannels.description: Whether YouTube should show an algorithmically generated list of related channels on your channel page

showBrowseView.description: Whether the channel page should display content in a browse or feed view

trackingAnalyticsAccountId.description: The ID for a Google Analytics account that you want to use to track and measure traffic to your channel

unsubscribedTrailer.description: The video that should play in the featured video module in the channel page's browse view for unsubscribed viewers

image.description: The image object encapsulates information about images that display on the channel's channel page or video watch pages

publishAt.description: If you set a value for this property, you must also set the status.privacyStatus property to private

recordingDate.description: The date and time when the video was recorded

selfDeclaredMadeForKids.description: Whether the video is designated as child-directed, and it contains the current "made for kids" status of the video

playlistId.description: Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression

regionCode.description: Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression

categoryId.description: Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression

dislike.description: Records that the authenticated user disliked the video

like.description: Records that the authenticated user liked the video

none.description: Removes any rating that the authenticated user had previously set for the video
